sentences.text_original: 听说你要租房子，找到了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tīng shuō nǐ yào zū fáng zi, zhǎo dào le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Eshitishimcha, uy ijaraga olmoqchisan, topdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Слышал, ты хочешь снять квартиру, нашёл?
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard you want to rent an apartment — have you found one?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没有。我昨天看了一间，但是不太满意。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi yǒu. Wǒ zuó tiān kàn le yì jiān, dàn shì bú tài mǎn yì.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q. Kecha bittasini ko'rdim, lekin unchalik ko'nglimga o'tirmadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Вчера посмотрел одну, но не очень доволен.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. I saw one yesterday, but I wasn't very satisfied.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 为什么？房子不好吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wèi shén me? Fáng zi bù hǎo ma?
sentences.text_translation: Nega? Uy yomonmidi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему? Квартира плохая?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why? Was the place no good?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 房子还可以，但是太小了，而且没有家具。
sentences.pinyin: Fáng zi hái kě yǐ, dàn shì tài xiǎo le, ér qiě méi yǒu jiā jù.
sentences.text_translation: Uy bo'lardi, lekin juda kichkina, va mebeli ham yo'q.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Квартира неплохая, но слишком маленькая, и нет мебели.
sentences.text_translation_en: The place is okay, but too small, and it has no furniture.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你想要多大的房子？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng yào duō dà de fáng zi?
sentences.text_translation: Qanchalik katta uy istaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какого размера квартиру ты хочешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: How big a place do you want?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想要一个卧室、一个客厅，还要有厨房和卫生间。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng yào yí ge wò shì, yí ge kè tīng, hái yào yǒu chú fáng hé wèi shēng jiān.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta yotoqxona, bitta mehmonxona, yana oshxona va hojatxona ham bo'lishini istayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу спальню, гостиную, а также кухню и санузел.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want one bedroom, one living room, and also a kitchen and bathroom.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 房租贵吗？
sentences.pinyin: Fáng zū guì ma?
sentences.text_translation: Ijara haqi qimmatmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Аренда дорогая?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is the rent expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那间房子一个月两千五百块，不包水电。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiān fáng zi yí ge yuè liǎng qiān wǔ bǎi kuài, bù bāo shuǐ diàn.
sentences.text_translation: U uy oyiga ikki ming besh yuz yuan, suv-elektr kirmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Та квартира две тысячи пятьсот юаней в месяц, без коммунальных.
sentences.text_translation_en: That place is 2,500 yuan a month, not including utilities.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有点贵。你打算租在哪儿？
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu diǎn guì. Nǐ dǎ suàn zū zài nǎr?
sentences.text_translation: Birozgina qimmat. Qayerdan ijaraga olmoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Дороговато. Где ты планируешь снимать?
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit expensive. Where do you plan to rent?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想租在市中心，离公司近一点。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng zū zài shì zhōng xīn, lí gōng sī jìn yì diǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Shahar markazidan, kompaniyaga yaqinroq joydan olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу снять в центре города, поближе к работе.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to rent in the city center, a bit closer to my company.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 市中心的房子比较贵。
sentences.pinyin: Shì zhōng xīn de fáng zi bǐ jiào guì.
sentences.text_translation: Shahar markazidagi uylar ancha qimmat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В центре города жильё довольно дорогое.
sentences.text_translation_en: Places in the city center are relatively expensive.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我知道。所以我今天又约了一个中介看房。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhī dào. Suǒ yǐ wǒ jīn tiān yòu yuē le yí ge zhōng jiè kàn fáng.
sentences.text_translation: Bilaman. Shuning uchun bugun yana bir vositachi bilan uy ko'rishga kelishdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я знаю. Поэтому сегодня я снова договорился с агентом о просмотре.
sentences.text_translation_en: I know. So today I made another appointment with an agent to view a place.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 房子在哪儿？
sentences.pinyin: Fáng zi zài nǎr?
sentences.text_translation: Uy qayerda?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Где квартира?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where is the place?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 离公司不远，走路十五分钟。
sentences.pinyin: Lí gōng sī bù yuǎn, zǒu lù shí wǔ fēn zhōng.
sentences.text_translation: Kompaniyadan uzoq emas, piyoda o'n besh daqiqa.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Недалеко от работы, пятнадцать минут пешком.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not far from the company, fifteen minutes on foot.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 价格呢？
sentences.pinyin: Jià gé ne?
sentences.text_translation: Narxi-chi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А цена?
sentences.text_translation_en: And the price?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一个月两千块，包水电和物业费。
sentences.pinyin: Yí ge yuè liǎng qiān kuài, bāo shuǐ diàn hé wù yè fèi.
sentences.text_translation: Oyiga ikki ming yuan, suv-elektr va kommunal xizmat haqi ham kiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Две тысячи юаней в месяц, включая коммунальные и плату за обслуживание.
sentences.text_translation_en: Two thousand yuan a month, including utilities and the management fee.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 听起来不错！你什么时候去看？
sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lái bú cuò! Nǐ shén me shí hou qù kàn?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshiga o'xshaydi! Qachon ko'rgani borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Звучит неплохо! Когда ты пойдёшь смотреть?
sentences.text_translation_en: That sounds good! When are you going to see it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 下午三点。你要不要一起去看看？
sentences.pinyin: Xià wǔ sān diǎn. Nǐ yào bu yào yì qǐ qù kàn kan?
sentences.text_translation: Tushdan keyin soat uchda. Birga borib ko'rasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В три часа дня. Хочешь сходить посмотреть вместе?
sentences.text_translation_en: Three in the afternoon. Do you want to come take a look together?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好啊！我也正好想了解一下租房。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ yě zhèng hǎo xiǎng liǎo jiě yí xià zū fáng.
sentences.text_translation: Mayli! Men ham aynan ijara haqida bilib olmoqchi edim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо! Я как раз тоже хотел узнать про аренду жилья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure! I happen to want to learn a bit about renting too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那下午见！希望这次能找到合适的。
sentences.pinyin: Nà xià wǔ jiàn! Xī wàng zhè cì néng zhǎo dào hé shì de.
sentences.text_translation: Unda tushdan keyin ko'rishamiz! Bu safar mosini topa olsam degandiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда до встречи днём! Надеюсь, в этот раз найду подходящую.
sentences.text_translation_en: See you this afternoon then! I hope I can find a suitable one this time.
sentences.speaker: B
